title: Speaking – Part 3: Collaborative Task
description: Discuss the options shown with your partner for about two minutes, then decide together which two would be most effective.

content.centralQuestion: What are the benefits and drawbacks of different team-building activities in a corporate setting?
content.decisionTask: Now decide which TWO options would be most effective for improving team cohesion.

script.text: Now, I'd like you to talk about something together for about two minutes.
Here are some options about team-building activities. [Shows task card]
First, discuss the advantages and disadvantages of each option. Then decide which two would be most effective for improving team cohesion. You have about two minutes.
Now decide together which two options would be most effective for improving team cohesion.
